messages.content:
Welcome everyone!

We're excited for the GStack x GBrain Hackathon tomorrow. Let's use this group chat for any questions + for any solo hackers looking to find teammates.

Hey guys :) AI Engineer here looking for anyone interested in fintech exploration / agent orchestration buildouts. 

​

I specialize in building agentic ai workflows & scalable k8 infra!
Hey Guys, we are a team of 2 and looking for front end & UI/UX. We want to work on visual models.
Bonus if there is a lawyer in the crowd, it will be fun
hey (Happy) would try to build out a tokenmaxing orchestrator if someone had challenges in the past to blow up your budget to get results - i want to talk to you
whats up y'all , excited for tomorrows hackathon ;)

Hey there, I am an AI Systems Engineer with 4 years of experience, looking for really strong backend folks who are cool with multimodal AI systems and designing AI system infrastructure with me. 

​

I have an idea of what to make for this hackathon, and I need more hands to develop this ambitious project.
DM me
I am solo hacking and would like to get one or two teammates ?
(idk how to dm on this app)
add me on discord - ch1kim0n1
same 😭
or you can DM me on linkedin too, my DMs are free there

hi guys - bundler background (Rspack, Vite, Bun) + ex-Toma founding eng (W24, a16z), working on a search engine for voice AI during the week, too much Rust and infra made me think I am going to hack something different this weekend to build a dating app for founders
lets link up on liknedin: <https://www.linkedin.com/in/robel-kidin/>
<https://x.com/robelktegegne>

Hey, I'm Mustafa Nomair

\- currently ai researcher via google x usc; incoming at apple

\- just got into Founders Inc Canopy program, where I will be building the future of computer use automation

\- 2x hackathon winner (1st place at an a16z one and 2nd at calhacks last year)

\- recently competed in yc x browser use hackathon to create jarvis -- real-time web scraping on a person using meta rayban glasses (more info: <https://tinyurl.com/yc-browseruse-jarvis>)

\- would love to work with anyone to build something cool 

​

socials:

​

I'm looking for teammates who specialize in front-end and UI/UX.

I am also one of the winners of another YC hackathon that happened last month for the Voice agent.

Hey guys! I'm Nao, co-founder and CEO of Lifestack (<https://lifestack.ai/>), a daily planner app powered by wearable health data.

My main passion has been around productivity tools and wearables, but lately I’ve been interested in AI agents for marketing as well, like agents that improve brand presence in AEO/AI search, or self-improving agents for TikTok content creation.

​

Linkedin: <https://www.linkedin.com/in/naoyukawa/>

Thinking of building an enterprise knowledge brain framework. I've a client lined up. Agents to write other bespoke agents, evals, adding structure to unstructured data - the whole enchilada.

looking to team up with folks interested in agentic systems, bio/health ai, or just building something fun. happy to bring the bio/drug discovery angle if anyone wants to hack on that.

Hey Randy, I am working on AI native engineering simulation.

​

So far we have pretty robust solvers for structural finite element analysis, computational fluid dynamics, and heat transfer. I’m planning to work on a composite module tomorrow for electronics simulation focused on chip design.

​

Let me know what file support your CAD system supports, maybe you could try Anvil for simulation afterwards!

​

<https://anvil-sim.vercel.app>

If you’re hacking with a team, you and your teammates can prompt Codex/Claude together in the same workspace, instead of everyone running their own Claude on their own laptop. 

You're gonna move so much faster working together than working alone.
